html:
“The protection this hat offers only really works on Bees and Bee-like creatures.”

-

The Beekeeper Hat is a wearable Armor item. It requires 8 Silk and 1 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.

The Beekeeper Hat has 1050 durability and absorbs 80% of damage taken from Bees, Killer Bees, Grumble Bees and the Bee Queen. If the player takes damage from any other Mob, the durability will not be reduced.

It is useful for harvesting Honey from a Bee Box, destroying Beehives and Bee Queen fight for Royal Jelly.

Skins

Main article: Belongings

  • The Elegant Mourning Veil skin is obtained by purchasing the Wendy and Abigail Funko Pop! figure set, e.g. from the Klei Store.
  • The Loyal Bee-Stealthy Cowl was a reward when the player logs in the game around the time of Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update. Like all the other items from that reward set, this item is a reference to another Klei Entertainment project. It references to main character from Mark of the Ninja.
Woven - Elegant
Costume Collection
Bee Bonnet
A tasteful veil keeps the bees from getting in.
Elegant
Mourning Veil
For the fashionably morose.
See ingame


Woven - Elegant
Cottage Collection
Beewitching Hat
Equal parts whimsy and protection.
Loyal
Bee-Stealthy Cowl
The bees will never know you were even there.

Trivia

  • The Beekeeper Hat was added in the October 2, 2012 update.

"beehat"
“Protects your skin, but squashes your meticulous coiffure.”
–Wilson
“This will keep the pokeys off of me.”
–Willow
“Is hat for to protect from stinger bees.”
–Wolfgang
“This will protect me from those happy buzzing sounds. Oh, and stings.”
–Wendy
“THE MESH IS SMALLER THAN BEE STINGERS”
–WX-78
“Appropriate protective equipment is a must!”
–Wickerbottom
“That'll keep the bees out of yer eyes.”
–Woodie
“I'll wear it if I have to.”
–Maxwell
“A bee helm, öf cöurse.”
–Wigfrid
“It's a face fortress!”
–Webber
“Essential honey harvesting attire.”
–Warly
“Looks good”
–Wormwood
“Respecting bees means respecting stingers.”
–Winona
“What if my horns get stung?”
–Wortox
“Can't see in here!”
–Wurt
“I can finally walk among the bees!”
–Walter
“I like having a layer of netting between the bees and my face.”
–Wanda
“The protection this hat offers only really works on Bees and Bee-like creatures.”
-
The Beekeeper Hat is a wearable Armor item. It requires 8 Silk and 1 Rope to craft and an Alchemy Engine to prototype.
The Beekeeper Hat has 1050 durability and absorbs 80% of damage taken from Bees, Killer Bees, Grumble Bees and the Bee Queen. If the player takes damage from any other Mob, the durability will not be reduced.
It is useful for harvesting Honey from a Bee Box, destroying Beehives and Bee Queen fight for Royal Jelly.
Skins[edit | edit source]
Main article: Belongings
The Elegant Mourning Veil skin is obtained by purchasing the Wendy and Abigail Funko Pop! figure set, e.g. from the Klei Store.
The Loyal Bee-Stealthy Cowl was a reward when the player logs in the game around the time of Cursed Confrontation Part 1 update. Like all the other items from that reward set, this item is a reference to another Klei Entertainment project. It references to main character from Mark of the Ninja.

Oh, and stings. |wx78 = THE MESH IS SMALLER THAN BEE STINGERS |wickerbottom = Appropriate protective equipment is a must! |woodie = That'll keep the bees out of yer eyes. |maxwell = I'll wear it if I have to. |wigfrid = A bee helm, öf cöurse. |webber = It's a face fortress! |winona = Respecting bees means respecting stingers. |warly = Essential honey harvesting attire. |wortox = What if my horns get stung? |wormwood = Looks good |wurt = Can't see in here! |walter = I can finally walk among the bees! |wanda = I like having a layer of netting between the bees and my face. |choose = wx78 }} {{Scrapbook_Info|The protection this hat offers only really works on Bees and Bee-like creatures.}} The '''Beekeeper Hat''' is a wearable [[Armor/DST|Armor]] item. It requires 8 [[Silk/DST|Silk]] and 1 [[Rope/DST|Rope]] to craft and an [[Alchemy Engine/DST|Alchemy Engine]] to prototype. The Beekeeper Hat has 1050 durability and absorbs 80% of damage taken from [[Bee/DST|Bees]], [[Killer Bee]]s, [[Grumble Bees]] and the [[Bee Queen]]. If the player takes damage from any other [[Mob]], the durability will not be reduced. It is useful for harvesting [[Honey/DST|Honey]] from a [[Bee Box/DST|Bee Box]], destroying [[Beehive/DST|Beehives]] and Bee Queen fight for [[Royal Jelly]]. == [[File:Skins Icon.png|32px|link=]] Skins == {{Main|Belongings#Head_items|Belongings}} * The '''Elegant Mourning Veil''' skin is obtained by purchasing the [[Wendy]] and [[Abigail]] Funko Pop! figure set, e.g. from the [https://shop.klei.com/ Klei Store]. * The '''Loyal Bee-Stealthy Cowl''' was a reward when the player logs in the game around the time of [[Cursed Confrontation Part 1]] update. Like all the other items from that reward set, this item is a reference to another Klei Entertainment project. It references to main character from Mark of the Ninja.
